mapper.select:
SELECT log_no AS logNo, payment_order_id AS paymentOrderId, order_no AS orderNo, process_stage AS processStage, log_level AS logLevel, log_level_type AS logLevelType, message, source, created_at AS createdAt FROM ( SELECT pa.attempt_no AS log_no, pa.payment_order_id, po.order_no, '支付提交' AS process_stage, CASE WHEN pa.attempt_status_type = 'danger' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN pa.attempt_status_type = 'warn' THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'INFO' END AS log_level, pa.attempt_status_type AS log_level_type, CONCAT('支付方式=', pa.payment_method, '；请求状态=', pa.attempt_status, '；请求报文=', pa.request_payload) AS message, pa.channel_code AS source, DATE_FORMAT(pa.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_attempt pa LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT pnl.notify_no AS log_no, pnl.payment_order_id, po.order_no, '渠道回调' AS process_stage, CASE WHEN pnl.notify_status_type = 'danger' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN pnl.notify_status_type = 'warn' THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'INFO' END AS log_level, pnl.notify_status_type AS log_level_type, CONCAT('回调类型=', pnl.notify_type, '；处理状态=', pnl.notify_status, '；结果=', COALESCE(pnl.notify_result, '-')) AS message, pnl.channel_code AS source, DATE_FORMAT(pnl.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_notify_log pnl LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pnl.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT prr.route_no AS log_no, prr.payment_order_id, po.order_no, '支付路由' AS process_stage, 'INFO' AS log_level, 'info' AS log_level_type, CONCAT('路由规则=', prr.route_rule, '；路由结果=', prr.route_result) AS message, prr.channel_code AS source, DATE_FORMAT(prr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_route_record prr LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT pe.event_no AS log_no, pe.payment_order_id, pe.biz_no AS order_no, '业务事件' AS process_stage, CASE WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'INFO' END AS log_level, CASE WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'info' END AS log_level_type, CONCAT('事件类型=', pe.event_type, '；事件载荷=', pe.event_payload) AS message, 'payment-core' AS source, DATE_FORMAT(pe.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_event pe ) payment_log_union
payment_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentOrderId}, '%')
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND process_stage = #{query.processStage}
AND log_level = #{query.logLevel}
AND source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.source}, '%')
AND message LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY log_level
ORDER BY process_stage
ORDER BY created_at
ASC
DESC
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT pa.attempt_no AS log_no, pa.payment_order_id, po.order_no, '支付提交' AS process_stage, CASE WHEN pa.attempt_status_type = 'danger' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN pa.attempt_status_type = 'warn' THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'INFO' END AS log_level, pa.attempt_status_type AS log_level_type, CONCAT('支付方式=', pa.payment_method, '；请求状态=', pa.attempt_status, '；请求报文=', pa.request_payload) AS message, pa.channel_code AS source, DATE_FORMAT(pa.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_attempt pa LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pa.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT pnl.notify_no AS log_no, pnl.payment_order_id, po.order_no, '渠道回调' AS process_stage, CASE WHEN pnl.notify_status_type = 'danger' THEN 'ERROR' WHEN pnl.notify_status_type = 'warn' THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'INFO' END AS log_level, pnl.notify_status_type AS log_level_type, CONCAT('回调类型=', pnl.notify_type, '；处理状态=', pnl.notify_status, '；结果=', COALESCE(pnl.notify_result, '-')) AS message, pnl.channel_code AS source, DATE_FORMAT(pnl.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_notify_log pnl LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = pnl.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT prr.route_no AS log_no, prr.payment_order_id, po.order_no, '支付路由' AS process_stage, 'INFO' AS log_level, 'info' AS log_level_type, CONCAT('路由规则=', prr.route_rule, '；路由结果=', prr.route_result) AS message, prr.channel_code AS source, DATE_FORMAT(prr.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_route_record prr LEFT JOIN t_payment_order po ON po.payment_order_id = prr.payment_order_id
UNION ALL
SELECT pe.event_no AS log_no, pe.payment_order_id, pe.biz_no AS order_no, '业务事件' AS process_stage, CASE WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'INFO' END AS log_level, CASE WHEN pe.event_type = 'PAYMENT_CLOSED' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'info' END AS log_level_type, CONCAT('事件类型=', pe.event_type, '；事件载荷=', pe.event_payload) AS message, 'payment-core' AS source, DATE_FORMAT(pe.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS created_at FROM t_payment_event pe ) payment_log_union
payment_order_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.paymentOrderId}, '%')
AND order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.orderNo}, '%')
AND process_stage = #{query.processStage}
AND log_level = #{query.logLevel}
AND source LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.source}, '%')
AND message LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%')
